item.title: Illiquid loans, investor demands: Blue Owl's software lending triggers another quake in private credit
item.description: Blue Owl, a direct lender specializing in loans to the software industry, said it had sold $1.4 billion of its loans to institutional investors at 99....

item.title: Stocks making the biggest moves premarket: Grail, Blue Owl Capital, Opendoor Technologies & more
item.description: These are the stocks posting the largest moves in premarket trading.

item.title: Stocks making the biggest moves after hours: Akamai Technologies, Opendoor, Live Nation & more
item.description: These are the stocks posting the largest moves in extended trading.

item.title: Fed officials split on where interest rates should go, minutes say
item.description: The Federal Reserve on Wednesday released minutes from its Jan. 27-28 meeting.

item.title: Stocks making the biggest moves premarket: Walmart, Hims & Hers, Carvana, Figma & more
item.description: These are the stocks posting the largest moves in the premarket.
